programmes.show_description: When a music label executive goes to a festival on the Outer Banks to check out an elusive new band, she discovers that the group is fronted by her childhood sweetheart. (2023)
Poppy and Milo are getting engaged, but only so that she can advance her career and he can move into a penthouse. It's purely transactional. Or is it? (2022)
Teleshopping.

Teleshopping.
After receiving a letter in a nightclub, the Postables are whisked on a trip to find the writer hiding from a troubled past, as Oliver learns more about his father. (2025)
Surprises are in store for Ilana when she travels to Santorini with her Greek boyfriend Mike for a family wedding. (2023)
Inspired by her father's legacy, Anya enters Finland's Joulurauha race. Partnered with a new dog, she faces challenges, her father's rival and her own anxieties. (2024)
Mystery Island hosts a corporate retreat with a guest being Emilia's ex-fiancé. Old feelings become complicated, tensions run high and allegations arise when a guest is found dead. (2025)
A chance encounter on Valentine's Day brings Hannah and Finn together as they race through New York City to return a lost engagement ring and save one couple's special day. (2025)
When four people find themselves stranded in a local diner on Christmas Eve, they bicker, bond and unwittingly provide each other with the answer to their respective prayers. (2023)
After suffering a series of setbacks, a professional golfer returns home to Budapest to reflect on her future in the sport. There, she meets a man who helps her rediscover herself. (2024)
On the eve of her sister's wedding, real estate agent Lisa must decide if developer Matthew Wallace holds the key to her heart. (2021)
After being called out during the launch of her landmark study on love, an acclaimed professor is forced to take her own dating test with the man who criticised it. (2022)
Lilly, a hopeless romantic and literary enthusiast, is surprised when her wish to talk to her favourite author comes true and Jane Austen herself appears in her life. (2024)
Samantha struggles in her battle to save her beloved nature sanctuary, until chance brings her someone to fight by her side. Romance starring Schitt's Creek's Tim Rozon. (2022)

The Island team meets their Mystery Mountain counterparts for a friendly murder game, but the fun ends with a murder in plain sight. (2025)
After being dumped and fired on the same day, Michelle is persuaded to attend a wellness and empowering program at a new retreat. Will she learn to Just Say Yes? (2023)
While trying to keep a failing Australian penguin sanctuary open, a nonprofit worker loses her heart to a compassionate zoologist. (2023)
The owner of a popular café could lose everything when a major celebrity is dumped there. Can she get him and his would-be-fiancee back together, or will she fall for him herself? (2023)
After their fake marriage proposal is filmed goes viral, Millie and Leo must keep up the ruse while ignoring their growing feelings. (2023)
Five years after finding a spark with a stranger on a train platform, a photographer finds himself seated next to the same woman on a plane heading to the same wedding - hers. (2023)
No mission is impossible for MI5 agent Claire... until she goes undercover as the royal nanny and spends her Christmas with charming Prince Colin. (2023)
Proposal planner Piper's wild scheme gets out of hand when she fakes a relationship in order to plan the perfect proposal for her client. (2022)
When a professional bridesmaid books a high-profile wedding, she must keep her identity a secret not just from the guests, but also from the handsome reporter covering the event. (2023)
